leadText: The Metal Powder (Japanese: メタルパウダー Metal Powder) is a type of held item introduced in Generation II. It boosts the Defense stat of a Ditto that holds it.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] This page is in need of spading . See its section on the spading page for more information, and how you can help. Reason: Does this item work when held by another Pokémon (such as Mew) transformed into Ditto? Generation II [ edit | edit source ] If held by a Ditto , increases its Defense and Special Defense by 50%, even when transformed . In Pokémon Stadium 2 , Metal Powder only increases Ditto's Defense and Special Defense when it is not transformed. [ 1 ] Generation III onward [ edit | edit source ] If held by a Ditto , doubles its Defense stat. It does not work when Ditto is transformed . ↑ https://www.smogon.com/forums/threads/gen-2-ps-development-post-bugs-here.3524926/page-17#post-9034110
